Spring Data Redis

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream.Record

Packages that use Record
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
Data structures and interfaces to interact with Redis Streams.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.stream
 

  • Uses of Record in org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream

    Subinterfaces of Record in org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ByteBufferRecord
    A Record within the stream backed by a collection of binary field/value pairs.
    interface 
    ByteRecord
    A Record within the stream backed by a collection of binary field/value pairs.
    interface 
    MapRecord<S,K,V>
    A Record within the stream backed by a collection of field/value pairs.
    interface 
    ObjectRecord<S,V>
    A Record within the stream mapped to a single object.
    interface 
    StringRecord
    A Record within the stream backed by a collection of String field/value pairs.

    Method
    Description

    Record.withId(RecordId id)
    Create a new instance of Record with the given RecordId.

    Create a new instance of Record with the given key to store the record at.

    Description

    StreamOffset.from(Record<K,?> reference)
    Create a StreamOffset from the given record id as reference to create the ReadOffset.from(String).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Mono<Long>
    ReactiveStreamOperations.acknowledge(@NonNull String group, @NonNull Record<K,?> record)
    Acknowledge the given record as processed.
    default Long
    StreamOperations.acknowledge(@NonNull String group, @NonNull Record<@NonNull K, ?> record)
    Acknowledge the given record as processed.
    default Flux<RedisStreamCommands.StreamEntryDeletionResult>
    ReactiveStreamOperations.acknowledgeAndDelete(@NonNull String group, @NonNull Record<K,?> record, @NonNull RedisStreamCommands.XDelOptions options)
    Acknowledges and conditionally deletes a given Record for a stream consumer group.
    default List<RedisStreamCommands.StreamEntryDeletionResult>
    StreamOperations.acknowledgeAndDelete(@NonNull String group, @NonNull Record<K,?> record, @NonNull RedisStreamCommands.XDelOptions options)
    Acknowledges and conditionally deletes a given Record for a stream consumer group.
    Mono<RecordId>
    ReactiveStreamOperations.add(@NonNull Record<K,?> record)
    Append the record, backed by the given value, to the stream.
    Mono<RecordId>
    ReactiveStreamOperations.add(@NonNull Record<K,?> record, @NonNull RedisStreamCommands.XAddOptions xAddOptions)
    Append the record, backed by the given value, to the stream with the specified options.
    RecordId
    StreamOperations.add(@NonNull Record<K,?> record)
    Append the record, backed by the given value, to the stream.
    RecordId
    StreamOperations.add(@NonNull Record<K,?> record, @NonNull RedisStreamCommands.XAddOptions xAddOptions)
    Append the record, backed by the given value, to the stream with the specified options.
    default Mono<Long>
    ReactiveStreamOperations.delete(@NonNull Record<K,?> record)
    Removes a given Record from the stream.
    default Long
    StreamOperations.delete(@NonNull Record<K,?> record)
    Removes a given Record from the stream.
    default Flux<RedisStreamCommands.StreamEntryDeletionResult>
    ReactiveStreamOperations.deleteWithOptions(@NonNull Record<K,?> record, @NonNull RedisStreamCommands.XDelOptions options)
    Deletes a given Record from the stream with extended options.
    default List<RedisStreamCommands.StreamEntryDeletionResult>
    StreamOperations.deleteWithOptions(@NonNull Record<K,?> record, @NonNull RedisStreamCommands.XDelOptions options)
    Deletes a given Record from the stream with extended options.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    StreamListener<K, V extends Record<K,?>>
    Listener interface to receive delivery of messages.
    interface 
    StreamMessageListenerContainer<K, V extends Record<K,?>>
    Abstraction used by the framework representing a message listener container.

    interface
